de.title: Warum Page-Builder deine WordPress Performance zerstören — und was wirklich hilft
de.description: WordPress Performance leidet unter Page-Buildern: JS-Bloat, riesige DOMs, render-blocking Assets. Was du messen solltest und was konkret hilft.
de.excerpt: Page-Builder sind bequem, aber teuer: Sie liefern aufgeblähten Code, der deine Core Web Vitals versenkt. Hier sind die Ursachen — und was tatsächlich hilft.

en.title: Why Page Builders Kill WordPress Performance — and What Actually Helps
en.description: WordPress page builder performance explained: why builders bloat your site, how to measure the damage with Core Web Vitals, and what actually fixes it.
en.excerpt: Page builders are convenient but expensive: they ship bloated code that tanks your Core Web Vitals. Here are the causes — and what genuinely fixes them.
